public_resources.name: curatedMetagenomicData
public_resources.description: Curated metagenomic profiles from 50+ published studies, >20,000 samples
public_resources.access: Free via Bioconductor (R) or Python wrapper
public_resources.relevance: PRIMARY SOURCE — pre-harmonized taxonomic profiles with phenotype metadata
public_resources.diabetes_studies: Multiple T1D and T2D studies included

public_resources.name: Human Microbiome Project (HMP)
public_resources.description: Reference human microbiome data from 4,788+ samples across body sites
public_resources.relevance: Reference microbiomes for healthy controls; oral + gut paired data

public_resources.name: DIAGRAM Consortium
public_resources.description: T2D GWAS summary statistics from largest meta-analyses
public_resources.relevance: Genomic layer for multi-omic integration; T2D risk variants
public_resources.status: Available — download summary stats from consortium website

public_resources.name: T1D Knowledge Portal
public_resources.description: T1D-specific GWAS, gene-level, and variant-level associations
public_resources.relevance: T1D genetic risk variants for multi-omic integration

public_resources.name: Metabolomics Workbench
public_resources.description: National metabolomics data repository with SCFA, bile acid profiles
public_resources.relevance: Metabolomic layer — SCFA profiles linked to microbiome composition

public_resources.name: UK Biobank Proteomics
public_resources.relevance: Proteomic layer — inflammatory markers, gut barrier proteins

public_resources.name: Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)
public_resources.description: Transcriptomic datasets — gut epithelial gene expression

public_resources.name: GMrepo
public_resources.description: Curated gut microbiome database with 58,000+ samples and phenotype data
public_resources.relevance: Cross-population microbiome data with disease phenotypes
